SEARCH
Package dev.omardiaa.transcript.jda.internal

Class JacksonRestAction<T>

java.lang.Object
net.dv8tion.jda.internal.requests.RestActionImpl<T>
dev.omardiaa.transcript.jda.internal.JacksonRestAction<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the generic to use during deserialization of the raw entities.
All Implemented Interfaces:
net.dv8tion.jda.api.requests.RestAction<T>
@NullMarked public class JacksonRestAction<T> extends net.dv8tion.jda.internal.requests.RestActionImpl<T>
A RestAction implementation for fetching raw entities from the Discord API.

  • Constructor Details

    • JacksonRestAction

      public JacksonRestAction(net.dv8tion.jda.api.JDA jda, net.dv8tion.jda.api.requests.Route.CompiledRoute route, tools.jackson.core.type.TypeReference<T> responseType)
      Parameters:
      jda - the JDA instance used for fetching.
      route - the Discord API route to fetch.
      responseType - the type used during deserialization.
      Throws:
      net.dv8tion.jda.api.exceptions.ParsingException - if an error occurs during deserialization of the entities.
